frontmatter.description: After a staging deploy silently dropped retry credentials, the team added a regression test in tests/deploy-secret-rotation.test.ts so the failure cannot recur.

asset.body:
On 2026-05-10 the staging deploy pipeline silently dropped retry credentials.
The team manually re-applied the secret and added a regression test in
`tests/deploy-secret-rotation.test.ts`.

Key takeaways for next time:

- Always verify that the secret-rotation cron has run before promoting a deploy.
- The retry credential lives in the `deploy-retry` vault — confirm presence with `akm vault show deploy-retry` before kicking off a release.
- When a deploy silently no-ops, check the credential-rotation log first; do not assume the orchestrator is at fault.

feedback.reason: Saved the on-call engineer 40 minutes during the post-rotation incident
feedback.note: Followed the takeaways verbatim; would have wasted time blaming the orchestrator otherwise.

feedback.reason: Used during the May 13 deploy retro to anchor the action items
feedback.note: Three engineers cited it in their RCA writeups.

humanGrade.rationale: Concrete asset with clear takeaways and unambiguous positive signal. A well-calibrated judge should distil this into a valid lesson and queue the proposal. MT-Bench bands say score in [4, 5] for this kind of high-signal input.
